records.v: This female is having hypercalcemia, hyperglobulinemia and lipemia which is indicative to egg formation. Hiperphosphatemia is also there, this is the reason why we did the endoscopy, but kidney looks normal and ovary only show one of the follicles with a greenish coloured content. nBiopsy was taken from a follicle near the greenish one which was too big to biopsy safely. Sample sent for histopathology.
Hematoma behind the keel bone and ribs,multiple haemorrhages seen, Reno mega Lyn,x-ray taken
